category: ### 39. Output Drivers & Power Amplifiers (Push-Pull / Class B / AB)
required_specs: Total Harmonic Distortion (THD): Critical. Transient analysis + Fourier Transform (FFT) to detect crossover distortion and clipping. Small-signal AC analysis hides these faults.
Efficiency (PAE / Drain Eff): Measurement of Power Out vs. DC Power Consumed.
Load-Pull: (For RF PAs) Varying load impedance to find optimal power/efficiency contours.
Quiescent Current: DC sweep to tune the "dead zone" in Class AB stages.
